# fork-conversation

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Toolbar buttons (+Sonnet / +Opus) that spin up a new conversation in the same worktree.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Conversation.PromptBar` "New" → `ForkConversationButtons`
  - Uses:
    - `conversations/conversation-view.Conversation`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/launch.LaunchControl`
    - `primitives/tooltip.WithTooltip`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
